finding: The import-failure hint named tp review --record unconditionally, including the exhausted-budget branch where §8.8 refuses that very command — a guaranteed dead end.

resolved.evidence: Round-12 revision applied to spec/0.23.0.md: §9.1 exhausted-budget hint rewritten as the §8.8 escalation sequence (no dead-end --record recommendation); §19.2 fixture extended with audit_max_rounds=2 and 2 dirty audit rounds so both refusal assertions follow from stated inputs

suggestion: Budget-exhausted branch names the escalation sequence: user-approved cap raise, then --record for confirming rounds, or user-approved --force.

finding: The audit half of the beyond-cap --record refusal assertion had no fixture support (no audit_max_rounds or audit rounds set up).

resolved.evidence: Round-12 revision applied to spec/0.23.0.md: §9.1 exhausted-budget hint rewritten as the §8.8 escalation sequence (no dead-end --record recommendation); §19.2 fixture extended with audit_max_rounds=2 and 2 dirty audit rounds so both refusal assertions follow from stated inputs

suggestion: Fixture sets review_max_rounds=2 and audit_max_rounds=2, each with 2 dirty rounds recorded.
